name: lrmem15e4_steps800
hypothesis: the ~0.30 format plateau is a sharp local minimum that diverging upward pushes (LR/capacity/binding/retention) cannot escape; a LOWER lr_memory 2.5e-4->1.5e-4 with more steps 800 trades speed for finer, more stable optimization, giving the coproduct binding a longer runway to find true retrieval instead of settling for the format shortcut.
